reason: Official ПДР question figure for 8.1.14 'Який світлофор застосовується для регулювання руху через залізничні переїзди?'. Numbered traffic-light types: (1) two horizontal red lights = railway-crossing signal with two alternating reds; (2) same two reds plus an upper white-moon light = the variant; (3) reversible/lane-control type with white lights. Answer = світлофори 1 і 2, which the figure matches. Sourced from the official exam image DB (web.testpdr.com/storage/questions/QNS_4026.jpg, official ticket infotech.gov.ua/.../4026), converted JPEG->PNG, 600x244. Verified by reading the saved file back: matches the source figure.
